title: Multi-axis candidate ranking with stability gates

axes.name: Tc_score
axes.description: Estimated full Tc (phonon + spin-fluctuation), normalized to 300 K target

axes.name: stability_score
axes.description: Combined thermodynamic (E_hull) and dynamic stability. 1.0 = known stable, 0.5 = predicted stable, 0.0 = unstable or unknown

axes.name: accessibility_score
axes.description: Synthetic accessibility: 1.0 = demonstrated synthesis, 0.5 = feasible with existing methods, 0.0 = speculative

gates.E_hull_gate: < 50 meV/atom (hard gate: candidates above threshold flagged but not promoted)
gates.dynamic_stability_gate: No imaginary phonon modes above -5 cm^-1 (soft gate: flagged if not verified)

candidates.synthetic_accessibility: HIGH -- demonstrated PQP synthesis, single crystals available
candidates.note: The benchmark itself ranks #1. No new candidate exceeds it. This is the key finding.

candidates.synthetic_accessibility: MEDIUM -- synthesized but requires high-pressure high-temperature methods
candidates.note: Known compound, lower Tc than Hg1223. Not a path forward.

candidates.synthetic_accessibility: MEDIUM -- Sm3Ni2O7 films demonstrated; SLAO substrates commercial
candidates.vs_Hg1223_Tc: Phonon-only: -5.1 K. Estimated full: -63 to -113 K below Hg1223 expt
candidates.note: Best NEW prediction. Testable. But estimated full Tc (38-88 K) still far below Hg1223.

candidates.vs_Hg1223_Tc: Phonon-only: -9.5 K. Estimated full: -78 to -120 K below Hg1223 expt
candidates.note: Existing experimental data (onset ~40 K) can validate the model.

candidates.Tc_estimated_full_K: unknown (no experimental reference for phonon fraction)
candidates.synthetic_accessibility: LOW -- no demonstrated synthesis, precise MBE required
candidates.note: Speculative. Volume-dilution of lambda makes hybrid approach fundamentally limited.

candidates.synthetic_accessibility: HIGH -- polycrystalline bulk, single crystals available
candidates.vs_Hg1223_Tc: Phonon-only: -14.0 K. Estimated full: -93 to -126 K below Hg1223 expt
candidates.note: Known compound. Ambient Tc ~40 K (onset). Stable and accessible but far from Hg1223.

candidates.synthetic_accessibility: LOW -- difficult synthesis, phase purity issues
candidates.vs_Hg1223_Tc: -43 K experimental. AF kills inner-plane SC.
candidates.note: Confirms n=3 is optimal. Adding layers is counterproductive.

rank_1.finding: THE BENCHMARK ITSELF REMAINS THE TOP CANDIDATE. No new material computed in v8.0 exceeds Hg1223 in any metric. This is the central honest finding of the milestone.

rank_3_best_new.finding: Best new prediction from v8.0. Testable with current MBE capabilities. But even the optimistic estimated full Tc (88 K) is well below Hg1223 (151 K).

computational_ceiling.explanation: Oxide phonon frequencies give omega_log ~ 250-350 K. Maximum achievable lambda_phonon ~ 1.0-1.5 for layered structures. Together: Tc_max(phonon) ~ 30-40 K via McMillan/Allen-Dynes. This is a fundamental material limitation, not a computational artifact.
computational_ceiling.implication: Phonon-only Eliashberg calculations are informative about the phonon channel but CANNOT predict full cuprate or nickelate Tc. The 80-120 K 'missing' Tc comes from spin fluctuations and must be computed with DMFT+Eliashberg or similar methods.

DEC-01_status: SATISFIED -- all candidates ranked by Tc, stability, and accessibility
VALD-04_status: SATISFIED -- stability gates applied (E_hull < 50 meV/atom, dynamic stability)
